home.headline: smash burgers that hit different.
home.body: We didn't set out to make the best burger in Beirut. We just got angry enough.
home.loreP1: Bunman didn't mean to invent the smash burger. He was just having a really bad day. The kind of day where you slam your fist into a ball of beef on a screaming-hot griddle and accidentally create the crispiest, juiciest, most unreasonably delicious burger Beirut has ever tasted.
home.loreP2: He opened a window in Mar Mikhael. Then a counter. Then a kitchen. Word spread the way it does in Beirut — fast, loud, and with opinions. Some said it was the sauce. Some said it was the smash technique. Bunman said nothing. He was too busy being angry and making burgers.
home.loreP3: Today, BUNMAN is open 7 days a week, 12pm to midnight. The menu is short because everything on it is perfect. The portions are honest. The attitude is not.

menu.headline: smash. eat. repeat.
